query: SELECT id, hostName, title, pricePerPerson, discountPercentage FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Grace%' AND discountPercentage > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, title, pricePerPerson, discountPercentage FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Grace%' AND discountPercentage > 0;

rows.title: Authentic "Shanghai home" dining experience featuring Braised Beef Brisket with Daikon Radish
